proposed_relations.description: Ridership is very low on the B44 between Flushing Ave and Taylor St

rationale: The claim describes ridership conditions on the B44 limited route between Flushing Ave and Taylor St.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Ridership is very low between Flushing Ave and Taylor St

quarantine.note: Route service-variant mismatch: the cited block explicitly mentions 'B44 local buses' and the claim's subject is 'B44 local bus between Flushing Ave and Taylor St', but the relation links to route_b44-limited (a limited-stop variant). The do_not_merge list confirms route_b44-limited and route_b44-local are distinct service variants that must not be conflated.
